series_metadata.series_description: Plan submitted by a facility showing monitoring schedules and findings. The plan, effective for 20 years, monitors for escaping gases, such as methane from landfills.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in operating area and 20 years in storage at State Record Center. If 20 years, facility feels landfill is free from escaping gases, EPA is asked remove plan. EPA monitors any escaping gas and if none is found, plan is re- moved. documents can
